_doc: Embedded tactical visuals for Agentic Architecture for Vibe Founders. {palette} resolves at runtime.

embedded-1.notes: Part 2 lead visual. The 5-Layer Questionnaire Architecture detailed. Each layer with inputs, action, outputs.
embedded-1.prompt:
Do not render any of these instructions as text in the image. Render only the labeled content described below.

Editorial reference diagram showing the 5-Layer Questionnaire Architecture for an agentic system. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. No font names, no typography labels, no instructions inside the image.
3. Spell every word and number exactly as written.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "The 5-Layer Questionnaire Architecture"
SUBTITLE: "From raw intent to locked context to parallel execution. Five passes, one system."

COMPOSITION: a horizontal flow of 5 layer-cards arranged left to right across the frame. Each card is a vertical rounded-rectangle. Cards are evenly sized and spaced. Thin bright cyan #06B6D4 horizontal arrows connect each card to the next.

EACH CARD HAS THREE STACKED ROWS:
- Top row: a small label pill with the layer number and name (in bright cyan, uppercase).
- Middle row: a single line describing the INPUT to this layer (medium sans-serif, off-white).
- Bottom row: a single line describing the OUTPUT of this layer (medium sans-serif, slate inside an off-white pill).

CARD 1 (leftmost):
Label pill: "LAYER 1 / CAPTURE INTENT"
Input line: "User answers 2 to 3 starter questions"
Output pill: "Goal statement"

CARD 2:
Label pill: "LAYER 2 / SURFACE UNKNOWNS"
Input line: "System asks 5 to 8 deeper questions"
Output pill: "Constraints + preferences"

CARD 3:
Label pill: "LAYER 3 / PROPOSE ANSWERS"
Input line: "System pre-fills from web research, user confirms or edits"
Output pill: "Filled context"

CARD 4:
Label pill: "LAYER 4 / LOCK CONTEXT"
Input line: "System packs all answers into one system prompt block"
Output pill: "Locked spec (read-only)"

CARD 5 (rightmost, slightly larger and with a soft bright cyan glow around the card outline):
Label pill: "LAYER 5 / EXECUTE"
Input line: "System fans out the work in parallel"
Output pill: "200 deliverables shipped"

ABOVE THE FLOW (small caption, centered, in bright cyan condensed mono uppercase): "USER TIME UNDER 5 MINUTES"
BELOW THE FLOW (small caption, centered, in bright cyan condensed mono uppercase): "SYSTEM TIME 8 TO 15 MINUTES"

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Card label pills: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4, uppercase
- Input lines: medium sans-serif, off-white
- Output pills: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill
- Captions above and below: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan, uppercase, small

BACKGROUND: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient. Subtle paper grain.
CARD STYLING: dark indigo cards with thin bright cyan outlines. Card 5 has a soft bright cyan glow.
ARROWS: thin bright cyan #06B6D4 with small soft glow on arrowheads.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces, no realistic icons.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No realistic illustrations of forms or apps.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K reference diagram.

embedded-2.notes: Part 3 visual. Dual Model Routing Decision Tree. Branching: task type to smart model OR cheap model.
embedded-2.prompt:
Do not render any of these instructions as text in the image. Render only the labeled content described below.

Editorial reference decision tree showing Dual Model Routing for an agentic system. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word and number exactly as written.
3. No font names or typography labels inside the image.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "Dual Model Routing"
SUBTITLE: "Smart Brain plus Cheap Hands. The 3-line decision rule."

COMPOSITION: a top-down decision tree. At the top center, a single root question box. Two thin bright cyan #06B6D4 branching arrows fan diagonally downward to the left and right. Each branch ends in a model card. Below each model card, a row of three example task-type pills.

ROOT BOX (top center, larger, dark indigo with bright cyan thick outline):
Label pill at top: "INCOMING TASK"
Main text inside box: "Does this task require judgement, structure decision, or net new content?"
Below the main text, two small directional sub-labels: "YES / left branch"  and  "NO / right branch"

LEFT BRANCH ARROW: thin bright cyan diagonal arrow flowing down and to the left, with the label "THINKING WORK" in condensed mono uppercase along the arrow.

RIGHT BRANCH ARROW: thin bright cyan diagonal arrow flowing down and to the right, with the label "HAND WORK" in condensed mono uppercase along the arrow.

LEFT MODEL CARD (lower-left, dark indigo with bright cyan outline, slightly larger, with a soft bright cyan glow around the outline):
Label pill at top: "SMART BRAIN"
Main heading: "Claude Sonnet, GPT-4.5, Opus"
Sub-text: "$3 to $15 per million tokens"

RIGHT MODEL CARD (lower-right, dark indigo with bright cyan outline):
Label pill at top: "CHEAP HANDS"
Main heading: "Gemini Flash, GPT-mini, Haiku"
Sub-text: "$0.10 to $0.40 per million tokens"

LEFT TASK-TYPE PILLS (below the SMART BRAIN card, three small off-white rounded pills in a horizontal row):
- "Plan structure"
- "Pick angle"
- "Write headline"

RIGHT TASK-TYPE PILLS (below the CHEAP HANDS card, three small off-white rounded pills in a horizontal row):
- "Generate API payload"
- "Convert format"
- "Stamp template"

BOTTOM CENTER COST CALLOUT (full-width strip, off-white panel with bright cyan border):
"200-task batch: naive $14  ->  dual-model $2.40  =  83% saved"

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Root box label pill: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan, uppercase
- Root box main text: bold sans-serif, off-white
- Sub-labels under root: condensed mono-spaced, off-white at 80%
- Branch arrow labels: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan, uppercase
- Model card label pills: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan, uppercase
- Model card main heading: bold sans-serif, off-white
- Model card sub-text: italic medium sans-serif, off-white at 75%
- Task-type pills: medium sans-serif, slate inside off-white
- Bottom cost callout: bold condensed mono-spaced, slate inside off-white panel; the dollar figures and percentage in bright cyan

BACKGROUND: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient. Subtle paper grain.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces.
- No realistic icons (no realistic brain anatomy, no realistic hand photography, no light bulbs, no gears, no cash icons).
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No real model logos (no Anthropic logo, no OpenAI logo, no Google logo).
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K reference decision tree.

embedded-3.notes: Part 4 visual. Parallel Fan-Out Diagram. 1 orchestrator to N concurrent workers to results pooled back.
embedded-3.prompt:
Do not render any of these instructions as text in the image. Render only the labeled content described below.

Editorial reference diagram showing Parallel Task Fan-Out for an agentic system. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word and number exactly as written.
3. No font names or typography labels inside the image.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "Parallel Task Fan-Out"
SUBTITLE: "One orchestrator. Ten workers. 200 tasks. Results pooled."

COMPOSITION: a three-column horizontal flow.

FAR-LEFT COLUMN (one large box at vertical center):
Label pill at top: "ORCHESTRATOR"
Main text: "Locked context + 200-task queue"
Sub-text: "Concurrency cap = 10"
This box is dark indigo with a bright cyan thick outline and a soft bright cyan glow around the outline. About 1/4 the frame width.

MIDDLE COLUMN (a vertical column of 10 small worker cards arranged in two stacks of 5, evenly spaced top to bottom):
Each worker card is a small rounded rectangle, dark indigo with thin bright cyan outline, about 1/14 the frame width.
Each worker card has a tiny label pill with one of the following texts (assigned in order top-to-bottom, left stack first then right stack):
- "WORKER 1"
- "WORKER 2"
- "WORKER 3"
- "WORKER 4"
- "WORKER 5"
- "WORKER 6"
- "WORKER 7"
- "WORKER 8"
- "WORKER 9"
- "WORKER 10"
Each worker card has a small status indicator dot inside it: 8 of the workers show a bright cyan filled dot (running), 2 show a faint orange-red ring (retrying with exponential backoff). The 2 retry indicators are on Worker 4 and Worker 9.

FAR-RIGHT COLUMN (one large box at vertical center, slightly larger than the orchestrator box):
Label pill at top: "RESULTS POOL"
Main text: "184 success / 16 retry"
Sub-text: "Ship the wins. Queue the misses for second pass."
This box is dark indigo with a bright cyan thick outline. About 1/4 the frame width.

ARROWS:
- 10 thin bright cyan arrows fan from the orchestrator out to each of the 10 worker cards. The arrows fan outward like spokes from a hub.
- 10 thin bright cyan arrows return from each worker card to the results pool. The return arrows converge inward like spokes meeting a hub.
- Arrowheads have a soft bright cyan glow.

BELOW THE FLOW (small caption strip, centered, off-white panel with bright cyan outline):
"Sequential: 90 minutes  ->  Parallel (10 workers): 8 minutes"

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Orchestrator label pill: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan, uppercase
- Orchestrator main text: bold sans-serif, off-white
- Orchestrator sub-text: italic medium sans-serif, off-white at 75%
- Worker label pills: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan, uppercase, small
- Results pool label pill: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan, uppercase
- Results pool main text: bold sans-serif, off-white
- Results pool sub-text: italic medium sans-serif, off-white at 75%
- Below-flow caption: condensed mono-spaced, slate inside off-white panel; the time figures in bright cyan

BACKGROUND: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient. Subtle paper grain.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces.
- No realistic icons (no factory worker icons, no robot illustrations, no gear icons).
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No real cloud provider logos.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K reference diagram.

embedded-4.notes: Part 7 visual. 90-Day Build Plan Timeline. Week-by-week deliverables.
embedded-4.prompt:
Do not render any of these instructions as text in the image. Render only the labeled content described below.

Editorial reference timeline showing the 90-Day Build Plan for an agentic product. Aspect 5:4.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word and number exactly as written.
3. No font names or typography labels inside the image.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "The 90-Day Build Plan"
SUBTITLE: "Week by week. One founder. One agentic product. Zero to first paying client."

COMPOSITION: a vertical timeline with 5 horizontal milestone bars stacked top to bottom. A thin vertical bright cyan #06B6D4 spine line runs down the center of the frame. 5 milestone markers (small bright cyan filled circles with off-white centers) sit on the spine, each connecting to a horizontal milestone bar that extends to either the left or right of the spine, alternating sides.

MILESTONE 1 (top, bar extends to the right of the spine):
Label pill at top of bar: "WEEK 1"
Main heading: "Spec the questionnaire layers"
Deliverable text: "Doc with all 5 layers, locked context shape, 1 worked example"

MILESTONE 2 (bar extends to the left of the spine):
Label pill at top of bar: "WEEKS 2 - 3"
Main heading: "Build the dual-model router"
Deliverable text: "Router function with retry + backoff. Cost math validated on 20-task batch."

MILESTONE 3 (bar extends to the right of the spine):
Label pill at top of bar: "WEEKS 4 - 6"
Main heading: "Parallel fan-out plus state"
Deliverable text: "Synthetic 200-task run. Under $3 cost. Under 10 minutes wall-clock. Crash-resumable."

MILESTONE 4 (bar extends to the left of the spine):
Label pill at top of bar: "WEEKS 7 - 9"
Main heading: "Real production with 1 paying client"
Deliverable text: "First production workload run. Issue list sorted by severity."

MILESTONE 5 (bottom, bar extends to the right of the spine, slightly larger and with a soft bright cyan glow):
Label pill at top of bar: "WEEKS 10 - 13"
Main heading: "Iterate on what broke"
Deliverable text: "6 paying clients. v1.2 shipped. Backlog sorted by what actually breaks in production."

AT THE TOP OF THE SPINE (small label, centered, in bright cyan condensed mono uppercase): "DAY 1 / START"
AT THE BOTTOM OF THE SPINE (small label, centered, in bright cyan condensed mono uppercase): "DAY 90 / SHIP"

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Milestone label pills: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4, uppercase
- Milestone main headings: bold sans-serif, off-white
- Deliverable text: medium sans-serif, off-white at 85%
- Spine end labels (DAY 1 / START and DAY 90 / SHIP): condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan, uppercase

BACKGROUND: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient. Subtle paper grain.
MILESTONE BAR STYLING: dark indigo bars with thin bright cyan outlines. The bottom milestone bar (Weeks 10-13) has a soft bright cyan glow around its outline.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces.
- No realistic icons (no calendars, clocks, rockets, trophies, checkmarks as central elements).
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No real Gantt-chart software UI.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K reference timeline.
